headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Digital Realty Trust (DLR) After Its Strong 1 Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Digital Realty Trust is attractively priced after a strong run, the key question is how its current share price lines up against its fundamentals. The stock recently closed at US$181.99, with returns of 3.9% over 7 days, 3.3% over 30 days, 17.4% year to date, 37.0% over 1 year, 116.7% over 3 years and 50.5% over 5 years. This naturally raises questions about what is already reflected in the price. Recent coverage has focused on Digital Realty Trust's role as a...
